fixture_note: Static mobile/web execution pack smoke only; not live robot state.
phone_copy: 请放入垃圾，确认安全后再开始送达。

hardware_sensor_procurement_execution_pa.blocker: blocker=missing 2D LiDAR / ToF source, procurement, mounting, wiring, calibration, HIL entry material
material_templates: mounting / wiring / calibration / HIL entry templates=not_proven
hardware_sensor_procurement_execution_pa.owner_handoff: owner_handoff=Hardware owner fills phone-safe material templates before field/HIL entry review.
hardware_sensor_procurement_execution_pa.safe_rerun_command: safe_rerun_command=rerun hardware_sensor_procurement_execution_pack gate with redacted material summary.
hardware_sensor_procurement_execution_pa.safe_phone_copy: 传感器采购执行包只读展示采购材料模板、blocker、owner handoff 和 safe rerun command；这是 software proof only。
hardware_sensor_procurement_execution_pa.recovery_hint: 补齐真实 2D LiDAR / ToF source、procurement、mounting、wiring、calibration 和 HIL entry 材料后再重跑执行包。
not_proven: 真实 material templates filled by owner

missing_materials: installation / wiring / calibration / HIL entry material=not_proven
accepted_materials: safe receipt intake envelope accepted for software proof only
rejected_materials: non-redacted receipt material must be rejected
hardware_sensor_procurement_receipt_inta.owner_handoff: owner_handoff=Hardware owner回填脱敏收货摘要，再进入安装/接线/标定/HIL entry review。
hardware_sensor_procurement_receipt_inta.next_required_evidence: next_required_evidence=真实 receipt/source/SKU、安装、接线、标定和 HIL entry 的 phone-safe 摘要。
hardware_sensor_procurement_receipt_inta.safe_phone_copy: 传感器采购收货回填只读展示材料接收、缺失、拒绝、owner handoff 和 next required evidence；这是 software proof only。
hardware_sensor_procurement_receipt_inta.recovery_hint: 补齐脱敏 receipt/source/SKU、安装、接线、标定和 HIL entry 材料后再重跑收货回填 gate。
